case_title: OPRTUN INC. VS. JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ CRUZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPRTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPRTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-03-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPRTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE ALFREDO YANEZ CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPRTUN INC.
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPRTUN INC.
